name: Sunday Sauce

ingredients.item: can San Marzano tomatoes plus one can of water

method: In a large frying pan on medium heat, add 2 T olive oil. Add chopped onion, ground beef, and sausages with the casings removed. Saute meat and onion, breaking up meat with a wooden spoon until meat is brown and onion is transparent. Add tomatoes, water, wine, and crushed garlic, 4 fresh torn basil leaves, salt, and pepper. Simmer on low for 1-3 hours, stirring occasionally. Add a little more water when needed, depending on how long you cook the sauce. Make fresh fettuccine or use packaged fresh fettuccine. Put the pasta directly into the sauce and manticare. Top with grated parmesan or pecorino and garnish the top with torn basil leaves. Serving suggestion: fresh bread and salad. Serves 2-3. Olé
